title: Purple Panorama
description: Adds unique purple panorama to Minecraft main screen.
body:
# What does it add?
_**Purple panorama**_ adds purple panorama, ironic isn't it?
Have you ever wanted to change your Minecraft panorama to something unique? So here's a beautiful purple panorama for you :]
# Will there be upcoming updates to the resourcepack?
Probably. I don't guarantee, but if this resourcepack will get attention, I'll probably change UI on main menu!
